svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="部署架构" id="luban-deploy"> <mxGraphModel dx="-574" dy="-153" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1100" pageHeight="620" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="G_USERS" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=6;" value="用户" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="140" x="30" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="N_U1" parent="1" style="shape=umlActor;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;html=1;outlineConnect=0;strokeColor=#2563eb;fillColor=#ffffff;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="运营 / 开发" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="40" x="70" y="64" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="N_U2" parent="1" style="shape=umlActor;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;html=1;outlineConnect=0;strokeColor=#2563eb;fillColor=#ffffff;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="终端访客" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="40" x="70" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="G_EDGE" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=6;" value="边缘" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="380" width="170" x="210" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="N_LB" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="负载均衡 / 网关
LB" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="140" x="230" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="N_CDN" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="CDN" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="140" x="230" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="G_ADMIN" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=6;" value="管理端区" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="200" x="420" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="N_A1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="luban
静态" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="168" x="436" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="N_BFF1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="luban-bff
×N" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="168" x="436" y="146" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="G_PUBLIC" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=6;" value="对外站点区" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="160" width="200" x="420" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="N_W1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="luban-website
SSR ×N" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="168" x="436" y="296" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="G_BACKEND" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=6;" value="后端区" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="380" width="180" x="660" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="N_BE1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="luban-backend
×M" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="140" x="680" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="G_DATA" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f0fdfa;strokeColor=#5eead4;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#134e4a;spacingTop=6;" value="数据区" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="380" width="180" x="890" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="N_R1" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ccfbf1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=11;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=10;" value="Redis
主从 / 集群" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="140" x="910" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="N_DB1" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ccfbf1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=11;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=10;" value="MySQL
主从" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="140" x="910" y="230" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E_U1_LB" edge="1" parent="1" source="N_U1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="N_LB"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E_U2_CDN" edge="1" parent="1" source="N_U2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="N_CDN"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E_LB_A1" edge="1" parent="1" source="N_LB" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.3;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="N_A1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E_LB_BFF1" edge="1" parent="1" source="N_LB" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.7;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="N_BFF1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E_CDN_W1" edge="1" parent="1" source="N_CDN" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="N_W1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E_W1_BFF1" edge="1" parent="1" source="N_W1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="N_BFF1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E_BFF1_BE1" edge="1" parent="1" source="N_BFF1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="N_BE1"> style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.4;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="N_R1"> style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.6;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="N_DB1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="LEGEND" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;align=left;spacingLeft=8;verticalAlign=middle;" value="图例：×N / ×M 表示多实例水平扩展；Redis 与 MySQL 均为主从部署（青绿色 = 数据区，独立扩缩容）。" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="1040" x="30" y="440" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
